message:
beads: Add comprehensive test coverage expansion epic with 37 tasks

Creates structured bead hierarchy for test coverage improvements:

MAIN EPIC: bd-cor0 - Comprehensive Test Coverage Expansion

SUB-EPICS:
- bd-2xl1: Unit Test Coverage - Real Implementations (No Mocks)
- bd-bri3: E2E Integration Tests with JSONL Logging
- bd-2ziz: Property-Based Testing with Proptest
- bd-2mc4: Test Infrastructure Improvements

CRITICAL TASKS (P0-P1):
- bd-3q4m: Unit tests for remote_compilation.rs (28KB, 0 tests) [P0]
- bd-7r84: Standardize TestLogger usage across E2E tests [P1]
- bd-2t7v: Unit tests for commands.rs [P1]
- bd-3h2k: Integrate E2E tests with cargo test [P1]

UNIT TEST TASKS (10 tasks):
- Cover modules with 0 tests: remote_compilation.rs, events.rs
- Expand low-coverage: workers.rs (2), alerts.rs (2), cache_cleanup.rs (3)
- CLI entry points: main.rs files for all crates

E2E LOGGING TASKS (12 tasks):
- Standardize TestLogger across all 12 E2E test modules
- Add structured JSONL logging to Bash scripts
- Integrate with cargo test --all-features

PROPERTY-BASED TESTING (6 tasks):
- Command classification with random inputs
- Artifact pattern matching edge cases
- Config parsing with malformed inputs
- JSON roundtrip tests
- Worker selection algorithm
- SSH command escaping

INFRASTRUCTURE TASKS (7 tasks):
- Code coverage reporting (tarpaulin/llvm-cov)
- Coverage gating in CI
- Test categorization (#[ignore])
- Performance regression detection
- Structured logging for all tests
- Test telemetry dashboard
- Evaluate mockall

Dependency graph ensures proper execution order:
- E2E logging tasks depend on TestLogger standardization
- Coverage gating depends on coverage reporting
- Core remote_compilation.rs tests unblock dependent modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
